context: Agent produces a complete decision log for a completed MoSCoW workshop with all required columns and metadata.

checklist.name: Header with release metadata
checklist.description: decision-log.md contains a header with release name (v2.0), release date (2026-05-01), and log creation date (2026-03-16).

checklist.name: All six decisions present in table
checklist.description: The table contains all six requirements with their correct categories (push notifications Must, offline mode Should, biometric Should, animated onboarding Could, two Won'ts).

checklist.name: Rationale and risk columns populated
checklist.description: Every row has non-empty business rationale and risk-if-omitted content (not 'N/A' or blank).

checklist.name: Won't items have review dates
checklist.description: Both Won't items (Apple Watch, landscape) have explicit review dates matching the provided dates (v3.0 / 2026-Q4 and 2026-08-01).

checklist.name: Summary counts at bottom
checklist.description: decision-log.md ends with a summary line stating the count per tier (Must: 1, Should: 2, Could: 1, Won't: 2).
